summary: Complete testing of Personal Gear (FPS Weapons + Armor Sets) feature. Backend: 25/25 pytest tests passed for /api/gear/weapons and /api/gear/armor endpoints. Frontend: All Gear page features verified working including tabs (28 weapons, 21 armor), search filtering, type filters, weapon/armor cards with stats, 'Where to find' expand/collapse, variant dropdowns. All regression tests passed (Dashboard, Ships, Routes, Community pages).

Backend: GET /api/gear/weapons returns 28 weapons - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: PersonalGear.jsx properly fetches data from both /api/gear/weapons and /api/gear/armor endpoints in parallel
Search filter correctly searches by name AND manufacturer
Type filters dynamically generated from weapon/armor types in data
WeaponCard and ArmorCard components properly display all stats with appropriate colors
Variant dropdown correctly shows base item and all variants
Locations expand/collapse uses AnimatePresence for smooth animations
Armor cards correctly separate 'Buy' locations from 'Loot/Farm' locations
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - gear data comes from personal_gear.py static data module
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gear page fully tested and working. /api/gear/weapons returns 28 FPS weapons (Pistol, SMG, Assault Rifle, LMG, Shotgun, Sniper Rifle, Railgun, Grenade Launcher, Missile Launcher, Medical Device). /api/gear/armor returns 21 armor sets (Heavy, Medium, Light, Flight Suit). Both endpoints are PUBLIC (no auth required). Frontend displays weapon cards with damage/ammo/range/fire_rate stats, armor cards with temp_max/temp_min/radiation stats. Both have 'Where to find' expand sections and variant dropdowns.

feature_verification_summary.gear_armor_api: PASS - GET /api/gear/armor returns 21 armor sets with all required fields

feature_verification_summary.gear_type_filters: PASS - Weapons: 10 types, Armor: 4 types (Heavy/Medium/Light/Flight Suit)
feature_verification_summary.weapon_cards: PASS - Shows type badge, size, name, manufacturer, damage, ammo, range, fire rate, description
feature_verification_summary.armor_cards: PASS - Shows type badge, name, manufacturer, max temp, min temp, radiation, description
feature_verification_summary.where_to_find: PASS - Expand/collapse works, armor shows BUY and LOOT/FARM sections

feature_verification_summary.nav_gear_link: PASS - Navigation bar shows Gear link, navigates to /gear

sample_item.name: Arclight Pistol
sample_item.description: Versatile laser pistol. 30-round battery, single/3-round burst. PvP favorite.

sample_item.name: Antium
sample_item.description: Best environmental resistance of all heavy armors. Exploration-grade.
